raw_consumer_statement:
I contacted Barclay us. As i have not used the card in some time however it was still active. I noticed charges of {$12000.00} in XXXX. I reported it as fraud. Barclay advised me that my address, phone number and email had been changed on my account. A new card was sent to another state and used. I was advised to send by mail to. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX delaware XXXX XXXX ) social security card front and back XXXX ) copy of Drivers license front and back XXXX ) a utility bill or bank statement I did as instructed and " NEVER HEARD BACK OR RECEIVED ANY DOCUMENTS FROM BARCLAY ''. I contacted them again as now it is showing XXXX late payments to the credit bureas. The card is closed however they are still holding me resposible after telling me no worries we are going to take care of it for you! 
I had a great credit score and now it is horrible. Please help me to resolve this matter.
